stemHtml: What must be completed by the flight crew prior to using controller pilot data-link communication (CPDLC)?

options.a: The log on (notification phase), including Flight Number.
options.b: Establish two-way voice communications before declaring CPDLC.
options.c: The log on (notification phase), including aircraft unique identifier.
options.d: Nothing - simply start using the CPDLC functions.
